description: Next.js feature flag PR - cachedNavigations property added across 17 files
rationale: Call-graph analysis: changes are property additions (interface fields, config values, conditionals) across 17 files. No function definitions or calls are modified, so no call-graph edges are created. Each file becomes an isolated component = 17 components = ERROR.
notes: Known limitation: cross-cutting property/feature-flag changes that only add interface fields and config values are not connected by the call graph. A shared-identifier analysis (same property name across files) could improve this, but is not yet implemented.
